---
title: "stratify()"
description: "Build static stratification branches in `g` (D56 first cut). Rules are a state node so future classifier data changes affect future source items, but branch count is fixed at construction."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build static stratification branches in `g` (D56 first cut). Rules are a state node so future
classifier data changes affect future source items, but branch count is fixed at construction.

## Import

```ts
import { stratify } from "@graphrefly/ts/composition";
```

## Signature

```ts
function stratify(
	g: Graph,
	source: Node<T>,
	rules: readonly StratifyRule<R>[],
	classifier: (rule: R, value: T) => boolean,
	opts: StratifyOptions<R> = {},
): Stratified<T, R>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `g` | `Graph` | Missing @param g JSDoc. |
| `source` | `Node<T>` | Missing @param source JSDoc. |
| `rules` | `readonly StratifyRule<R>[]` | Missing @param rules JSDoc. |
| `classifier` | `(rule: R, value: T) => boolean` | Missing @param classifier JSDoc. |
| `opts` | `StratifyOptions<R>` | Missing @param opts JSDoc. |

## Returns

`Stratified<T, R>`
